LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE BECAUSE OF THE MOVING PARTY'S INFORMING THE COURT OF A LATE APPEARANCE. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER AT 10:15 AND STILL NO APPEARANCE FROM THE MOVING PARTY, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: CROSS DEFENDANT MARK MELTON'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 6, 2012 TO PROVIDE THE MOVING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM JUNE 25 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. IF THIS IS NOT DONE, THE DEMURRER WILL BE OVERRULED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: JOANNE BRYCE, CSR # 3321

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT INSTRUCTED THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AND TRY TO RESOLVE THEIR DIFFERENCES. ROSS COMPLAINANT EDDA LEWIS' MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 16, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 FOR HEARING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EDDA LEWIS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 15, 2012 TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH THE OPPORTUNITY TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSITION PAPERS MUST BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 302 BY 4PM ON MARCH 7 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EDDA NINA LEWIS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE COMPLAINT PLEADS SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT THE REMEDY OF A CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST. THE FINANCIAL ELDER ABUSE CAUSE OF ACTION IS ADEQUATELY PLED. THE ALLEGATIONS INDICATE THAT PLAINTIFF HAD A BENEFICIAL INTEREST OR TITLE IN THE REAL PROPERTY AND DEFENDANT SHOULD HAVE KNOWN THAT HER CONDUCT WOULD HARM PLAINTIFF. THE CONVERSION CAUSE OF ACTION STATES A COGNIZABLE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THAT SHE HAD AN INTEREST IN THE EQUITY. PLAINTIFF STATES A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS ACTING AS PLAINTIFF'S REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT AGENT. THE COMPLAINT SUPPORTS AN ACCOUNTING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Continued To Jun-22-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT EDDA NINA LEWIS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled in its entirety. The complaint pleads sufficient facts to support the remedy of a constructive trust. The financial elder abuse cause of action is adequately pled. The allegations indicate that plaintiff had a beneficial interest or title in the real property and defendant should have known that her conduct would harm plaintiff. The conversion cause of action states a cognizable claim. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that she had an interest in the equity. Plaintiff states a cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty because defendant was acting as plaintiff's real estate investment agent. The complaint supports an accounting. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
